name: All calculators
summary: Every calculator on the site, grouped by category.

name: AI calculators
summary: Tools for working with AI APIs and large language models.

name: LLM Token Usage Calculator
summary: Estimate the per-call, daily, monthly and annual cost of an LLM workload across Claude, GPT, Gemini and DeepSeek. Side-by-side comparison, baked-in pricing dated for transparency, browser-only.

name: Broadband calculators
summary: Work out the speed, bandwidth, and plan that actually fits your household or office.

name: Broadband Bandwidth Calculator
summary: Estimate the download and upload speeds your household needs based on streaming, video calls, gaming, smart devices, and remote work.

name: Web Hosting Storage & Bandwidth Estimator
summary: Work out how much storage and monthly bandwidth your website needs based on your traffic, page weight, media files, and downloadable content. See which hosting tier fits.

name: Math calculators
summary: Everyday maths tools for quick, honest answers.

name: Percentage Calculator
summary: Work out a percentage of a number, what percentage one number is of another, or the percentage change between two values.

name: Images calculators
summary: Resize, convert and inspect photos without uploading them anywhere.

name: Photo Resizer
summary: Resize and convert photos in your browser. Pick a width, a height, a format and a quality. Your image never leaves your device.

name: Conversions calculators
summary: Metric-imperial converters for everyday units.

name: Unit Converter
summary: Length, mass, volume, temperature, speed and area. Pick a category, enter a value, see every common unit at once. Metric and imperial side by side.

name: Finance calculators
summary: Sensible estimates for everyday money decisions.

name: US Mortgage Calculator
summary: Work out your monthly US mortgage payment with principal, interest, property tax, home insurance, HOA and PMI broken out separately. Total interest and total cost over the life of the loan.

name: UK Mortgage Calculator
summary: Work out a UK monthly mortgage payment during the fixed-rate period and after it reverts to SVR, plus stamp duty and all the cash you need on completion day.

name: Loan Calculator
summary: Work out the monthly payment, total interest and total cost of any fixed-rate personal, auto or student loan. See how much you save by paying extra each month. Currency is a toggle (£ / $ / €).

name: Compound Interest Calculator
summary: See how a starting balance and regular contributions grow with compound interest, with optional inflation adjustment and a year-by-year breakdown. Currency is a toggle.

name: Debt Payoff Calculator
summary: Work out how long it takes to clear a debt and how much interest you pay. Add an extra monthly payment to see exactly how much time and interest you save.

name: UK Salary Tax Calculator
summary: UK take-home pay calculator for 2025/26. Enter your gross salary to see income tax, National Insurance, student loan deductions and monthly take-home. England, Wales and Northern Ireland rates.

name: UK Stamp Duty Calculator
summary: UK Stamp Duty Land Tax calculator for England and Northern Ireland, 2025/26 rates. Covers standard purchases, first-time buyers and additional properties, with the full band breakdown.

name: Tip Calculator
summary: Work out the tip, grand total and per-person share for any bill. Optional round-up-per-person mode keeps the numbers clean when the split is awkward. Currency toggle covers USD, GBP, EUR, CAD and AUD.

name: Savings Goal Calculator
summary: Work out the monthly number you need to put aside to hit a target amount by a target date. Factors in starting balance and optional interest. Currency toggle covers USD, GBP, EUR, CAD and AUD.

name: Business calculators
summary: Numbers for running, pricing, and growing a business.

name: Break-Even Calculator
summary: Calculate your break-even point in units and revenue. Enter fixed costs, variable cost per unit, and selling price to see exactly how many sales you need before you start making a profit.

name: Profit Margin Calculator
summary: Calculate gross and net profit margin from revenue and costs, or find the selling price needed to hit a target margin. Shows markup versus margin clearly.

name: Freelance Day Rate Calculator
summary: Work out the day rate you need to charge as a freelancer or contractor. Enter your income target, billable days, expenses, pension, and downtime to get a realistic day and hourly rate.

name: UK VAT Calculator
summary: Add or remove UK VAT at standard (20%), reduced (5%) or zero (0%) rates. See the net, VAT amount and gross instantly.

name: ROI Calculator
summary: Work out your return on investment as a percentage, net profit and annualised return (CAGR). Works for property, shares, business investments, ad spend and anything else with a cost and a return.

name: SEO ROI Calculator
summary: Enter your monthly SEO cost, current and projected organic traffic, and conversion data to see ROI, monthly profit, and the minimum sessions needed to break even.

name: Email Marketing ROI Calculator
summary: Enter your list size, send frequency, open and click rates, and conversion data to see ROI, monthly profit, cost per conversion, and the minimum list size needed to cover your costs.

name: Website Performance Budget Calculator
summary: Set realistic page-weight and Core Web Vitals targets for your site type and audience. See what a slow site is costing you in lost revenue.

name: IT Support Build vs Buy Calculator
summary: Compare the annual cost of hiring in-house IT support against an outsourced managed service. Shows annual totals, monthly equivalents, the verdict at your headcount, and the break-even users.

name: Domain Renewal True Cost Calculator
summary: See the real multi-year cost of a domain once the promo first-year price is gone and add-ons (privacy, email, DNS, SSL) are stacked up. Optional comparison against a cheaper registrar.

name: Health calculators
summary: Quick health and fitness numbers, with the caveats made plain.

name: BMI Calculator
summary: Work out your body mass index in metric or imperial units, with the WHO category and an honest note on what BMI can and cannot tell you.

name: Calorie Calculator
summary: Calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) and daily calorie needs based on your age, weight, height and activity level. See how many calories to eat to lose, maintain or gain weight.

name: Running Pace Calculator
summary: Calculate your running pace, total finish time, or distance covered. Enter any two of pace, distance, and time. Metric and imperial, with race time predictions for 5K, 10K, half marathon and marathon.

name: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator
summary: Work out your estimated due date from your last period, conception date, or IVF transfer date. Shows current gestational age, trimester, and key milestone dates.

name: TDEE Calculator
summary: Work out Total Daily Energy Expenditure and BMR using Mifflin-St Jeor, Harris-Benedict or Katch-McArdle. Includes cut and bulk targets and a starting macro split.

name: Fun calculators
summary: Calculators that don't pretend to be useful.

name: Age in Months Calculator
summary: Enter a date of birth and find out exactly how many months old you are. A reference to the Parenting Hell podcast bit about adults reporting their age the way parents of toddlers do.

name: Date Difference Calculator
summary: Enter two dates to see the gap in years, months, days, weeks, hours and weekdays. Auto-flips reversed dates so the answer is always positive.

name: Productivity calculators
summary: Browser-based tools for everyday tasks. Nothing uploaded, nothing stored.

name: iCal Event Generator
summary: Create a .ics calendar file for any event. Set the date, time, timezone, location and recurrence, then download and import into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, or any other calendar app.

name: SEO calculators
summary: Practical SEO tools that run in your browser.

name: URL Slug Generator
summary: Turn any heading into a clean, ASCII-safe, hyphen-separated URL slug. Optional stop-word stripping and length cap.

name: Meta Length Checker
summary: Check SEO title and meta description against Google's display limits in characters and approximate pixel width.

name: Property calculators
summary: Figures for buying, renting, moving, and maintaining a home.

name: Rental Yield Calculator
summary: Gross yield, net yield, monthly cash flow and return on deposit for any rental property. Currency toggle, workings shown.

name: UK Rent vs Buy Calculator
summary: Compare the net cost of buying a UK home against renting over any horizon. Stamp duty, mortgage interest, maintenance, selling costs and the opportunity cost of the deposit all included.

name: Wedding calculators
summary: Planning tools for weddings. Timeline generators, date calculators, and checklists.

name: Save the Date Calculator
summary: Enter your wedding date to get a personalised planning timeline: when to send save-the-dates, book vendors, send formal invitations, set the RSVP deadline, and handle final preparations.

name: Wedding Budget Calculator
summary: Enter your total budget and guest count to get a recommended spend breakdown across venue, catering, photography, music, flowers, attire, stationery, transport, and contingency.

name: Wedding Day Timeline Generator
summary: Enter your ceremony time and reception end time to generate a complete wedding day schedule from bridal preparation through to carriages.

name: Wedding Drinks Calculator
summary: Enter your guest count and event duration to get bottle and quantity estimates for white wine, red wine, prosecco, beer, spirits, and soft drinks.

name: Wedding Table Planner Calculator
summary: Enter your guest count and preferred table size to find out how many tables you need, how many seats will be spare, and how alternative sizes compare.

name: Wedding Catering Calculator
summary: Enter your guest count, meal style, and number of courses to get portion counts and food weight estimates for every part of your wedding day.

name: Wedding Anniversary Calculator
summary: Enter your wedding date to find out which anniversary you are celebrating, the traditional and modern gift themes, and your upcoming milestone anniversaries.

name: Writing calculators
summary: Tools for writers, editors, and anyone working with words.

name: Read Time Calculator
summary: Paste any text to see word count, character count, sentence count, and estimated reading time silently and aloud. Useful for blog posts, scripts, speeches, and podcast outlines.

name: Word Count Tool
summary: Live word, character, sentence and paragraph counts for pasted text, with fit-checks for tweet, meta description, SMS and SEO title limits.

name: Suffolk Lorem Ipsum Generator
summary: Placeholder text in Suffolk dialect, drawn from Charlie Haylock's work and the East Anglian dialect tradition.

name: English to Suffolk Translator
summary: Paste English text and see it transformed into Suffolk dialect, word by word, using the same vocabulary as the Suffolk Lorem Ipsum generator.
